perf.regime: memory-bound flat-1D elementwise; one kernel/one pass. softplus of the scalar params + the piecewise nonlinearity are computed per lane in fp32. Portable Triton runs on amd_cdna3 (gfx942) and NVIDIA; a wider BLOCK + vectorized loads are the tune-for-cdna lever.

notes: Hand-written (not DSL-generated): the vkl math IR has no value-comparison primitive (> / <) and no log, so xIELU's where(x>0,...) branch-on-sign and the param softplus are not expressible in the DSL (author-an-op-spec SKILL.md hand-written fallback). The internal BLOCK=2048 / num_warps=8 tile is selected inside the JIT launcher and is NOT accepted by the entry signature, so it is not a specialization_knob (documented here per §1.2).
